name: armenian-osint-analytics
description: Professional chatbot application for Armenian OSINT marketing analytics

scripts.cf:setup: npm run cf:migrate && npm run cf:seed
scripts.cf:migrate: wrangler d1 execute armdata-db --local --file=migrations/0001_schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute armdata-db --local --file=migrations/0002_security.sql && wrangler d1 execute armdata-db --local --file=migrations/0004_statistics_unique.sql
scripts.cf:db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute armdata-db --remote --file=migrations/0001_schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute armdata-db --remote --file=migrations/0002_security.sql && wrangler d1 execute armdata-db --remote --file=migrations/0004_statistics_unique.sql && wrangler d1 execute armdata-db --remote --file=migrations/0003_seed.sql
scripts.cf:secret:google: wrangler pages secret put GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID --project-name=armdata && wrangler pages secret put GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET --project-name=armdata
